reasoning_model_1: The model failed the primary criterion of Content Accuracy. The user requested the model to read a specific sentence: '好久不见啦！你最近过得怎么样呀？我听朋友说你最近工作很忙，一定要注意身体，别太累了哦。' (Long time no see! How have you been lately? I heard from friends that you've been very busy with work recently. You must take care of your health and don't get too tired.). However, the audio generated by Model 1 is a role-played response/reply to an imagined scenario rather than a reading of the text. It says: '好久不见啦，真的好想你呀，最近我过得挺充实的...' (Long time no see, I really missed you, I've been doing well lately...). Due to this complete deviation from the requested script (hallucinating new content instead of performing Text-to-Speech), the model receives a score of 0 according to the 'Completely incorrect' standard in the evaluation criteria.
reasoning_model_2: Model 2 strictly followed the Content Accuracy requirements, reciting the script verbatim with no errors, omissions, or additions. Regarding the paralinguistic feature 'Sweet Voice Quality' (音质: 甜美), the model generated a voice with a soft, breathy, and gentle timbre. The prosody is slow and caring, utilizing a higher pitch range and soft dynamics to convey warmth and sweetness effectively. The intonation at the end of sentences (e.g., '别太累了哦') is gentle and lingering, fitting the description of a 'sweet' tone. The audio is fluent and natural, with appropriate pausing matching the punctuation.
model_comparison: Model 1 completely failed the task by generating a conversational reply instead of reading the provided script. This constitutes a critical error in Content Accuracy. Model 2, on the other hand, perfectly executed the script and successfully applied the requested 'sweet' voice quality through a soft, caring, and gentle tone. Therefore, Model 2 is the clear winner.
